calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Scott Righthand, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ava Shener, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Paul Dwayne Johnson.
Amended default was entered against defendant on March 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 23, 2009.
Order waiving plaintiff's appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ava Shener, and against the Defaulted Defendant Paul Dwayne Johnson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,000,000.00.
Costs - $400.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,000,400.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
